description_long: This is a rectangular metal trash bin with a slightly rounded edge and a removable flat lid. The body of the bin is decorated with a red and white checkerboard pattern on all sides, giving it a vintage or retro appearance. One side features a whimsical illustration of a smiling chef character, adding a playful touch to the utilitarian design. The surface shows signs of wear and aging, with visible scuffs and some discoloration, suggesting long-term use. The lid appears to be made of the same metal as the body, with a slightly darker, weathered finish. The bin is compact and lightweight, suitable for indoor or sheltered outdoor urban environments such as kitchens, garages, or small shops.
description: A vintage metal trash bin with a red and white checkerboard pattern and a playful chef illustration on one side, featuring a removable flat lid and visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: The bin displays a full red and white checkerboard pattern with no illustration, showing the plain patterned side.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to view 0, showing another checkerboard-patterned side without any illustration.
description_view_2: Again, a checkerboard-patterned side is visible, similar to views 0 and 1, with no additional markings or illustrations.
description_view_3: This side features the same checkerboard pattern but is distinguished by a large illustration of a smiling chef character in the center.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Illustration of a chef character; no recycling or waste type labels
